description: Archived V1.41 plan per Profile B. P0 merged to iteration/v1.41 with QC/QA Approve.
title: P0 — DF-60 multi-work lifecycle (locks + creator works IA)

metadata.description: P0 — DF-60 completion ceremony, locks, creator works IA migration
metadata.qc: qc1 (architecture) Approve (post-fix-wave); qc2 (security+correctness) Approve; qc3 (performance+reliability) Approve (post-fix-wave). Consolidated gate: Approve (3a6cb4c2).
metadata.qa: Approve (19b457e1). All 7 ACs PASS; clippy/fmt/test clean; spec amendment §3.2 verified; residual register audited (12 entries).
shipped: Migration 202606100002_v141_multi_work_locks.sql: 5 new works columns (runtime_lock_holder, runtime_lock_acquired_at, completion_locked_at, novel_completion_status CHECK, lineage_from_work_id FK) + novel_pool_entries table (P0 minimal: entry_id, creator_id, work_id, status, promoted_at, note; partial unique index on creator_id WHERE status='active')
Rust types: WorkRecord/WorkPatch/WorkApiDto extended; row_to_work_record, create_work, insert_work_tx, patch_work, patch_work_tx updated; 13 downstream files updated

CompletionLock struct (work_id, locked_at, reason, schema_version) with write/read/release helpers; atomic tmp+rename; supervisor+boot recovery write callers; spec amendment §3.2 declares DB column as SSOT and file as derived artifact
ScheduleSupervisor gains workspace_dir; WorkComplete path calls write_completion_lock_if_available; boot recovery also writes lockfile

Daemon HTTP: POST /v1/local/works/pool (action=set_pool_active transactional demote-promote) and POST /v1/local/works/{work_id}/completion-lock/release (DB clear + file delete best-effort) — both registered in api/mod.rs
CreateWorkRequest extended with lineage_from_work_id and set_pool_active; create_work handler persists lineage and promotes pool row on set_pool_active=true (shared set_pool_active_inner helper)

CLI: creator works (list, status, use, completion-lock release); hard-removal of creator run list|status (no alias); creator run start --from-work + --set-default; creator run resume --reopen --reason --extend-chapters N
Tracing upgrade: mark_work_completed emits info! with work_id, creator_id, completion_locked_at, work_ref
8 hermetic tests across orchestration (3), daemon-runtime (3), CLI contract (5 v141_ tests in command_surface_contract)
Spec amendment: novel-writing/multi-work-lifecycle.md §3.2 declares DB column works.completion_locked_at as authoritative; .completion-lock.json is a derived artifact

R-V141P0-02 (low) creator works handle_status duplication -> V1.42
R-V141P0-03 (low) WorkPatch 30 fields builder pattern -> V1.42

R-V141P0-06 (low) works status missing-file hint for completion-lock -> V1.42 UX
R-V141P0-07 (low, accept-with-fix) DB+file reconciliation helper -> closed in fix wave Fix 4
R-V141P0-09 (low) novel_pool_entries partial index EXPLAIN check -> V1.41 P1
R-V141P0-10 (low, accept) repeated_sweeps_remain_stable pre-existing flake -> backlog
R-V141P0-11 (nit, accept) WorkSummary list view omits completion_locked_at -> V1.42 UX
R-V141P0-12 (low) .sqlx/ offline cache not refreshed -> V1.41 P-last

notes: P0 — DF-60 multi-work lifecycle. AC1..AC7 all PASS post-fix-wave. Schema migration 202606100002 introduces 5 new works columns + novel_pool_entries; completion_lock.rs is the single source of truth for lockfile schema (with schema_version v1). Daemon handlers added for pool + completion-lock release. CLI surface fully migrated from 'creator run list|status' to 'creator works list|status' (hard-remove, no alias). 12 residuals registered (1 high deferred to P-last/V1.42; 8 low; 1 nit; 2 closed in fix wave).
